---
title: 'Benchmark: Structural Topic Model (STM)'
author: 'Kenichi Satoh'
date: "Last updated: `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y/%m/%d')`"
output:
  word_document:
    fig_width: 12
    fig_height: 12
    toc: no
---

This script reproduces Table 9 (STM benchmark) in
"Wild Bootstrap Inference for Non-Negative Matrix Factorization
with Random Effects" (Satoh, 2026).

```{r, dpi=300, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, message=TRUE}
library(quanteda)
library(stm)

# ----------------------------
# Settings
# ----------------------------
K <- 3
min_termfreq <- 100
seed <- 123
max_em_its <- 200
nsims_effect <- 200
thr_repword <- 0.5
topn_repword <- 30

use_intercept <- TRUE

# Topic permutation (to match NMF-RE ordering)
topic_perm <- c(2, 1, 3)

make_era <- function(year) {
  ifelse(year <= 1865, "Early",
         ifelse(year <= 1945, "Industrial", "Postwar"))
}

# ----------------------------
# 1) Corpus -> DFM
# ----------------------------
# Load cached corpus for reproducibility (run save_inaugural.R first)
if (file.exists("data/inaugural_corpus.RData")) {
  load("data/inaugural_corpus.RData")
  corp <- corpus(inaugural_texts, docvars = inaugural_docvars)
  cat("Loaded cached inaugural corpus (", length(inaugural_texts), " documents)\n")
} else {
  cat("WARNING: Using quanteda::data_corpus_inaugural directly.\n")
  cat("  For exact reproducibility, run: source('save_inaugural.R')\n")
  corp <- corpus(data_corpus_inaugural)
}

tok <- tokens(corp)
tok <- tokens_remove(tok, pattern = stopwords("en", source = "snowball"))
df  <- dfm(tok)
df  <- dfm_select(df, min_nchar = 3)
df  <- dfm_trim(df, min_termfreq = min_termfreq)
df  <- df[rowSums(df) > 0, ]

# ----------------------------
# 2) Metadata (Year -> era)
# ----------------------------
meta <- docvars(df)
meta$era <- make_era(meta$Year)
meta$era <- factor(meta$era, levels = c("Early", "Industrial", "Postwar"))
if (use_intercept) {
  meta$era <- relevel(meta$era, ref = "Early")
}
docvars(df, "era") <- meta$era

# ----------------------------
# 3) Convert to STM input and fit
# ----------------------------
stm_in <- convert(df, to = "stm")
stm_in$meta$era  <- meta$era
stm_in$meta$Year <- meta$Year

set.seed(seed)

use_intercept <- FALSE

prev_formula <- ~ 0 + era

fit <- stm(documents = stm_in$documents,
           vocab     = stm_in$vocab,
           K         = K,
           prevalence = prev_formula,
           data      = stm_in$meta,
           init.type = "Spectral",
           max.em.its = max_em_its,
           verbose   = TRUE)

prep <- estimateEffect(1:K ~ 0 + era, stmobj = fit, metadata = stm_in$meta,
                       uncertainty = "Global", nsims = nsims_effect)
summary(prep)


# ----------------------------
# 4) Effect estimation (era)
# ----------------------------
eff_formula <- if (use_intercept) {
  as.formula(paste0("1:", K, " ~ era"))
} else {
  as.formula(paste0("1:", K, " ~ 0 + era"))
}

prep <- estimateEffect(1:K ~ era, stmobj = fit, metadata = stm_in$meta,
                       uncertainty = "Global", nsims = nsims_effect)

prep <- if (use_intercept) {
  estimateEffect(1:K ~ era, stmobj = fit, metadata = stm_in$meta,
                 uncertainty = "Global", nsims = nsims_effect)
} else {
  estimateEffect(1:K ~ 0 + era, stmobj = fit, metadata = stm_in$meta,
                 uncertainty = "Global", nsims = nsims_effect)
}

print(summary(prep))

# ============================================================
# 5) Topic representative words
# ============================================================

# (A) STM standard: labelTopics
cat("\n\n===== (A) STM labelTopics (top words) =====\n")
lt <- labelTopics(fit, n = 15)
for (j in 1:K) {
  k <- topic_perm[j]
  cat(sprintf("\n[Display Topic %d  (STM Topic %d)]\n", j, k))
  cat("  Highest Prob: ", paste(lt$prob[k, ], collapse = ", "), "\n", sep="")
  cat("  FREX        : ", paste(lt$frex[k, ], collapse = ", "), "\n", sep="")
  cat("  Lift        : ", paste(lt$lift[k, ], collapse = ", "), "\n", sep="")
  cat("  Score       : ", paste(lt$score[k, ], collapse = ", "), "\n", sep="")
}

# (B) Pr(topic|word)
cat("\n\n===== (B) Representative words via Pr(topic|word) =====\n")

get_p_topic_given_word <- function(fit) {
  K <- fit$settings$dim$K
  beta <- exp(fit$beta$logbeta[[1]])
  beta <- as.matrix(beta)
  if (nrow(beta) != K && ncol(beta) == K) beta <- t(beta)
  stopifnot(nrow(beta) == K)
  colnames(beta) <- fit$vocab
  p_t_given_w <- sweep(beta, 2, colSums(beta), "/")
  p_t_given_w
}

p_t_given_w <- get_p_topic_given_word(fit)

get_rep_words <- function(p_t_given_w, topic_id, thr = 0.5, topn = 30) {
  v <- p_t_given_w[topic_id, ]
  idx <- which(v > thr)
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(character(0))
  idx <- idx[order(v[idx], decreasing = TRUE)]
  words <- colnames(p_t_given_w)[idx]
  if (length(words) > topn) words <- words[1:topn]
  words
}

for (j in 1:K) {
  k <- topic_perm[j]
  rw <- get_rep_words(p_t_given_w, topic_id = k, thr = thr_repword, topn = topn_repword)
  cat(sprintf("\n[Display Topic %d  (STM Topic %d)]  thr=%.2f\n", j, k, thr_repword))
  if (length(rw) == 0) {
    cat("  (no words exceed threshold)\n")
  } else {
    cat("  ", paste(rw, collapse = ", "), "\n", sep="")
  }
}

# Top words by Pr(topic|word) (always top-N)
cat("\n\n===== (B2) Top words by Pr(topic|word) (always top-N) =====\n")
topn_always <- 20
for (j in 1:K) {
  k <- topic_perm[j]
  v <- p_t_given_w[k, ]
  idx <- order(v, decreasing = TRUE)[1:topn_always]
  words <- colnames(p_t_given_w)[idx]
  cat(sprintf("\n[Display Topic %d  (STM Topic %d)] top-%d\n", j, k, topn_always))
  cat("  ", paste(words, collapse = ", "), "\n", sep="")
}

```
